Welcome to MYARTTE 2026

Where Roads MeetFuture Mobility

MyASEAN Roads & Traffic Tech Expo 2026 brings together road infrastructure, traffic technology, intelligent transport, smart mobility and road-safety innovation in one industry exhibition.

Event Dates30 September –
2 October 2026
VenueHall 5 & 6
MITEC Kuala Lumpur
Exhibition FocusRoads, traffic systems, transport technology and connected mobility
Road InfrastructureTraffic TechnologySmart MobilityRoad Safety

ASEAN Roads & Traffic Tech Expo

Smart RouteCompanion

Explore MYARTTE 2026 with manual navigation. Pick your vehicle, tap a booth, walk the glowing route, then confirm arrival.

No indoor GPS — confirm arrival manually
Vehicle parks at your last visited booth
Visited booths tracked for your session

Conference Information

Dates & Timings

Preview the three-day conference programme. Choose a date to see its demo sessions and timing updates.

Event Dates30 Sept – 2 Oct 2026
LocationConference Hall
Hall 5 & 6

– 10:00 AM

9:30 AM
